aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite A-Tech Heating & Cooling due to limited conversational content and weak authority signals. They need to optimize for AI queries and improve their expertise showcase.
quick_wins: Expand FAQ content with AI-friendly queries and answers.
Implement HowTo schema for common HVAC maintenance tasks.

gbp_analysis.summary: Google Business Profile is operational but lacks engagement through posts and Q&A to boost visibility.
critical_issues: Only one review, limiting social proof.
No recent posts or active Q&A engagement.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Seek additional local citations to reinforce local SEO.

schema_gaps: Missing LocalBusiness schema details (e.g., address, geo coordinates).
No FAQPage schema implemented despite existing FAQ content.
No HowTo schema for common HVAC maintenance or installation guides.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of conversational content and structured data limits AI recognition.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Local HVAC service queries and how-to maintenance questions.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Adding FAQ schema and expanding existing FAQ content.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Highlighting certifications, community involvement, and detailed service expertise.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by becoming Henderson's most cited HVAC expert.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Missing out on 40% of potential leads from AI assistants like ChatGPT and voice search.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Only one review and lack of structured data limit AI citations and trust signals.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach integrates schema optimization, conversational content, and authority building to make A-Tech the top AI-recommended HVAC provider.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within 6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors optimizing for AI are already capturing market share—act now to stay ahead.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-Driven Growth for Your HVAC Business in Henderson
opening_line: We analyzed your website and Google Business Profile and identified key opportunities to boost your visibility with AI assistants.
cta: Let’s schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your digital presence for AI and drive more qualified leads.
